channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fox News Digital Sports NFL power rankings after Week 14 of the 2024 season
item.description: The Detroit Lions remain our top team in the NFL, but with a wild week in the NFL there are many changes in Fox News Digital's power rankings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Gilgeous-Alexander scores 39 as Thunder beat Mavericks 118-104, advance to NBA Cup semifinals
item.description: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 39 points, and the Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Dallas Mavericks 118-104 on Tuesday night in an NBA Cup quarterfinal.
item.dc:creator: Cliff Brunt, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Joe Burrow's home broken into during Monday Night Football in latest pro-athlete home invasion
item.description: ANDERSON TOWNSHIP, Ohio (AP) — Bengals quarterback Joe Burrow's home was broken into during Monday Night Football in the latest home invasion of a pro athlete in the U.S., authorities said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn will serve as a forerunner, test out the course before World Cup races at Beaver Creek
item.description: Lindsey Vonn will test out the downhill and super-G courses as a forerunner before the World Cup races this weekend in Beaver Creek, Colorado. The U.S. Ski Team confirmed her role Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Washington Nationals win lottery for first No. 1 overall draft pick since teen Bryce Harper in 2010
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — The Washington Nationals will have the No. 1 overall pick in the amateur draft for the first time since selecting a 17-year-old Bryce Harper in 2010.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mbappe, Vinicius and Bellingham on target as Real Madrid beats Atalanta 3-2. Liverpool wins again
item.description: Real Madrid’s big stars turned on the style to revive the Spanish giant’s faltering Champions League title defense on Tuesday. Galacticos Kylian Mbappe, Vinicius Junior and Jude Bellingham all scored in a thrilling 3-2 win at Italian league leader Atalanta.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: High school girls basketball rankings Dec. 10, 2024: Bay Area News Group Top 20
item.description: High school girls basketball rankings: Mitty stays at No. 1, Northgate and Castilleja enter the Top 20 as St. Francis moves up.
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Cowboys cheerleader dating Bengals kicker Cade York has sweet reaction after successful extra point attempt
item.description: Dallas Cowboys cheerleader Zoe Dale had a sweet reaction to her boyfriend, Cincinnati Bengals kicker Cade York, after his first extra point attempt during Monday night's win.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 7 of the world’s best soccer clubs will play at the Rose Bowl in 2025
item.description: The FIFA Club World Cup 2025 is being hosted in the United States, and one of the venues selected to host group stage matches is the Rose Bowl. Matches at the Rose Bowl are scheduled for June 15, 17, 19, 21, 23 and 25, officials announced Monday.
item.dc:creator: Will Conybeare, KTLA 5

item.title: Cubs announce 2025 coaching staff
item.description: CHICAGO — The Cubs announced its 2025 coaching staff Monday under the helm of second-year manager Craig Counsell. There are four new additions to his staff, including replacements for third base coach Willie Harris and first base coach Mike Napoli.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Embiid scores 31 in his return, Maxey has his first triple-double, Sixers beat Bulls 108-100
item.description: Joel Embiid had 31 points and 12 rebounds in his return, Tyrese Maxey got his first career triple-double and the Philadelphia 76ers held on to beat the Chicago Bulls 108-100 on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utes QB Isaac Wilson enters transfer portal
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utes freshman quarterback Isaac Wilson announced on Sunday that he is entering the transfer portal after one season. Wilson threw for 1,510 yards and 10 touchdowns as a freshman, starting seven games in place of injured starter Cam Rising.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Willy Adames agrees to $182 million, 7-year deal with the Giants, AP source says
item.description: Willy Adames has agreed to a $182 million, seven-year contract with San Francisco, providing the Giants with a power-hitting shortstop in the prime of his career, according to a person familiar with the negotiations.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: LA Galaxy hold off New York Red Bulls to win their record 6th MLS Cup championship
item.description: Joseph Paintsil and Dejan Joveljic scored in the first half, and the LA Galaxy won their record sixth MLS Cup championship with a 2-1 victory over the New York Red Bulls on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: NFL QB Jayden Daniels scores Christmas toys for kids in San Bernardino
item.description: What does a rising star in the NFL do when his team is on its bye week? Washington Commanders quarterback Jayden Daniels decided to make sure the kids back home have a great holiday season.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Jazz cruise to rare blowout win over Portland, 141-99
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In what has been an extremely difficult rebuilding year, the Utah Jazz will relish nights like this one.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes sweep College of Charleston in NCAA Tournament
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Utah's incredible turnaround season isn't done yet. After going 11-19 in 2023, the Utes Volleyball team has advanced to the second round of the NCAA Tournament after a three-set sweep over the College of Charleston Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU loses in first round of NCAA Tournament
item.description: WEST LAFAYETTE, Ind. — The BYU women's volleyball team was making its 13th consecutive appearance in the NCAA Tournament. But for the first time since 2005, the Cougars are going home after losing in the first round.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Manny Pacquiao, winner of titles in a record 8 weight classes, elected to Boxing Hall of Fame
item.description: (AP) -- Manny Pacquiao, who won titles in a record eight weight classes from flyweight to super welterweight while becoming one of boxing's biggest draws, was elected Thursday to the International Boxing Hall of Fame.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Golden State Valkyries unveil uniforms ahead of inaugural WNBA season
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Valkyries won’t take the court for their inaugural 2025 season until May 16, but fans are getting an early look at the WNBA team’s uniforms which were unveiled Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Aggies win MWC opener over Wyoming, 70-67
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The undefeated streak is still going for the Aggies. Ian Martinez scored 17 of his 23 points in the second half to help Utah State defeat Wyoming 70-67 on Wednesday night at The Spectrum. Mason Falslev's layup with 35 seconds left stretched Utah State's lead to 70-64.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Flames honor Johnny Gaudreau, welcome his family back to Calgary in emotional pre-game tribute
item.description: The Calgary Flames paid tribute to longtime star Johnny Gaudreau on Tuesday night before their game against the Columbus Blue Jackets, months after the All-Star was killed while biking on a New Jersey road this summer.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9
